objective: Adapt the useful part of upstream/will/lfm-2.5-unified into a local non-prompting LFM2.5-VL generated-token cache gate.

details: Added a non-prompting LFM2.5-VL model resolver for real-model tests.
The resolver honors MLX_ENGINE_LFM25_VL_MODEL_PATH, then the retained benchmark model path under /Volumes/StudioStackSSD4TB, then existing ~/.lmstudio model slots.
Added a heavy LFM2.5-VL text-only generated-token cache test adapted from upstream/will/lfm-2.5-unified without invoking model_getter, input(), or lms get.
The test verifies first-request uncached generation, second-request cache reuse above the prefill step size, small follow-up prefill, and response fidelity for the generated name Silas.

upstream_source.subject: Add test for LFM 2.5 caching
upstream_source.adaptation: Ported the intent into the current local batched VLM test surface using the retained LFM2.5-VL 8-bit model path instead of the old ~/.lmstudio model_getter-only path.

validation.result: 1 skipped with reason: need --heavy option to run

decision.next_action: Use this non-prompting LFM2.5 generated-token cache gate when evaluating future prompt-cache or text-only VLM caching changes. It does not itself promote a latency candidate.
